title: Add Internet Identity login for portfolio owner content management

requirements.text: Integrate Internet Identity authentication so the portfolio owner can log in and unlock content editing capabilities. Use the existing useInternetIdentity hook and useActor hook. Add a login/logout button in the Navigation bar (desktop and mobile views) that triggers the Internet Identity flow.

quotes: add an Internet Identity login so only you can update your portfolio content

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Login' button is visible in the Navigation bar when the user is not authenticated
Clicking 'Login' triggers the Internet Identity authentication flow
After successful login, the button changes to display 'Logout' (or a user avatar/indicator)
Clicking 'Logout' ends the session and returns the UI to unauthenticated state
The login/logout button is accessible on both desktop and mobile (hamburger menu) layouts
The existing amber/gold theme is applied consistently to the auth button

requirements.text: Implement backend Motoko actor functions to store and retrieve editable portfolio content (bio, project entries, contact info) in stable variables. Expose update functions that are gated so only the canister controller/owner principal can call them; read functions remain public.

quotes: only you can update your portfolio content

acceptanceCriteria: Stable variables store editable content: bio text, list of projects (title, description, tech tags, link), and contact details
Public query functions return all stored portfolio data
Update functions check that the caller principal matches the owner principal and trap/return an error for unauthorized callers
Owner principal is set once during canister initialization (or via a one-time claim by the first caller)
Default/seed data is pre-populated so the site renders correctly before the owner has made any edits

requirements.text: When the portfolio owner is authenticated via Internet Identity, display inline edit controls (text inputs, project add/remove forms) on the Hero, About, and Portfolio sections. On save, call the backend update functions through the authenticated actor. When not authenticated, the site renders in read-only mode using the publicly queried data.

quotes: only you can update your portfolio content

acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated visitors see the portfolio in read-only mode with no edit controls visible
Authenticated owner sees edit icons or inline edit buttons on bio, contact details, and project cards
Editing and saving bio/contact info calls the backend update function and refreshes the displayed data via React Query
Owner can add a new project card and remove existing ones from the Portfolio section
All edits are persisted in the backend stable variables and survive page refresh
Save/cancel controls follow the existing amber/gold dark theme

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All backend logic must remain in a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo
Owner-gated update functions must enforce principal-based access control; do not rely on client-side checks alone
nonGoals: Multi-user or role-based access control beyond a single owner
Email or social authentication (only Internet Identity)
Real-time collaboration or live content sync between multiple sessions
